description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large glass panels, clean white walls, and wooden accent elements, creating a sleek and contemporary appearance. The front area includes a driveway with a parked car and a landscaped section with greenery. The rear and side yards are landscaped with trees, a patio, and outdoor seating, enhancing the living space with natural elements. The building has multiple large windows, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and modern aesthetics.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, white walls, and landscaped outdoor areas with trees and patios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended patio, outdoor seating area, and additional landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, outdoor furniture, and multiple large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back entrance, more trees, and the continuation of the driveway.
